company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver Human Resources Center for senior temporary/part-time work; excludes headhunting.
notes: Official company site confirmed at webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/. Contact form found at inquiry_1 page. No public email. Company is a public-interest incorporated association for senior employment support, not a headhunter.
